name: chat
description: Feature-object chat surface and standalone chatroom demo.

verbs.name: match_object
verbs.source: verb :match_object(name, location) rxd { return match_object(name, location); }

verbs.name: match_verb
verbs.source: verb :match_verb(name, target) rxd { return match_verb(name, target); }

verbs.name: parse_command
verbs.source: verb :parse_command(text, actor) rxd { return parse_chat_command(text, actor); }

classes.description: Stable sentinel returned when no visible object matches.
Stable sentinel returned when multiple visible objects match.
Standalone chat room class whose behavior comes from $conversational.

features.description: Feature object carrying live chat verbs for spaces.

verbs.name: say
verbs.source: verb :say(text) rxd { observe({ type: "said", actor: actor, text: text }); return true; }

verbs.name: emote
verbs.source: verb :emote(text) rxd { observe({ type: "emoted", actor: actor, text: text }); return true; }

verbs.name: tell
verbs.source: verb :tell(recipient, text) rxd { observe({ type: "told", from: actor, to: recipient, text: text }); return true; }

verbs.name: look
verbs.source: verb :look() rxd { return { description: this.description, contents: this.contents, present_actors: this.subscribers }; }

verbs.name: enter
verbs.source: verb :enter(who) rxd { let entrant = who || actor; this:add_presence(entrant); observe({ type: "entered", actor: entrant }); return this.subscribers; }

verbs.name: leave
verbs.source: verb :leave(who) rxd { let leaver = who || actor; this:remove_presence(leaver); observe({ type: "left", actor: leaver }); return this.subscribers; }

verbs.name: command
verbs.source: verb :command(text) rxd { let cmd = $match:parse_command(text, actor); return dispatch_chat_command(this, cmd); }

seed_hooks.name: Lobby
seed_hooks.description: The first runnable chat room. It is a live lobby where connected actors can speak, emote, tell, look, and see who is present through the $conversational feature.
